mapper.select: /** EvlTableDao.select */ select evl_table_id , evl_table_nm , evl_mthd_cd , indvdlz_opinion_writng , enabled from uspt_evl_table where evl_table_id = #{evlTableId}

/** EvlTableDao.selectModifyEnableCnt */ select count(*) as cnt from uspt_evl_table a inner join uspt_evl_cmit b on a.evl_table_id = b.evl_table_id where a.evl_table_id = #{evlTableId} and b.evl_sttus_cd not in (#{evlSttusCd}, null)
